final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-video vertical cover for an 8k GGU gaming monitor launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch keynotes, MUJI brand identity heritage, Dieter Rams' Braun design philosophy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds (三分线构图)
Subject: must include the gaming monitor as the focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary/supporting text)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be vertical format optimized for short-video cover; large headline must be eye-catching and prominent
Avoid:
